zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain於1145年之前與Peredur ap Ednowain在威爾士結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain于1145年之前与Peredur ap Ednowain在威尔士结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain married Peredur ap Ednowain before 1145, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain a épousé Peredur ap Ednowain avant 1145, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain hat vor 1145 in Wales Peredur ap Ednowain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain lei sposato Peredur ap Ednowain prima del 1145, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Peredur ap Ednowainは1145年以前にウェールズでPeredur ap Ednowainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain(은)는 1145년 이전 웨일스에서 Peredur ap Ednowain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain casou-se com Peredur ap Ednowain antes 1145, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain вышла замуж за человека по имени Peredur ap Ednowain перед 1145 г. в местности Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain se casó con Peredur ap Ednowain antes de 1145, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
